hero-subtitle: Newly graduated application developer – testing tech stack & ideas.
card1-text: I am experimenting with static webspace, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
card2-text: Google Analytics integration for real-time analysis of my little playground.
about-text: Hello! I'm Zafer, a trained application developer. As a generalist, I combine web development with database expertise, agile project management, and modern AI support. Whether it's code, hardware, or workflow optimization – I'm always ready to find a solution.
disclaimer-text: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links.
game-box-text: This game is a personal hobby project of mine. I am currently developing and improving it on the side whenever I find the time.
